missions.title: Create And Integrate QA Agent
missions.description: Lord of the Machines currently does not have a QA agent role. Implement and integrate a QA agent into the mission workflow, including role prompt, runtime phase support, runner wiring, and baseline tests.

metadata.goal: Add a dedicated QA capability to improve delivery reliability and verification quality.
workflow_constraints: Implement real code changes; do not stop at planning.
Keep changes scoped to mission/runtime/prompting/runner wiring and tests.
Do not remove existing role behavior unless replacing it intentionally with QA integration.
Run local tests for touched mission modules.

deliverables.description: QA role prompt and role profile are added.
Mission runtime phase mapping and transitions include QA phase integration.
Mission runner creates and wires a QA role executor.
Tests updated or added to validate QA integration.
Document what was implemented, where, and how QA fits in the workflow.

acceptance_criteria: A QA agent role exists in prompts and can be created by the role factory.
Mission runtime flow includes a QA phase and role mapping.
Mission runner wiring includes QA agent executor.
